parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Mid: Boosts or cuts the midrange to tailor the tone for you and your guitar. At 50%, MID had no effect.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Output: Sets the overall level of the block.
